name: io.github.gru-953/memorised-them-all
description: Local, token-free file → knowledge-graph memory for Claude (Desktop & Code). Converts any attachment — PDF, Office (incl. legacy .doc/.ppt/.xls), HTML, CSV, EPUB and more — to Markdown and digests it into a layered graph + exportable memory, entirely on-device. Deterministic and model-free (no LLM/Ollama/embedding model/GPU), so it always completes and is byte-identical. BM25 recall returns a tiny cited slice; PII suppressed; archives unpacked safely; legacy Bengali auto-converted to Unicode. Cross-platform (Linux/macOS/Windows).
